name: Neo Tokyo
description: Anime/manga-inspired theme with vibrant gradients, sakura pink, and energetic motion. Bouncy spring animations, pill shapes, and gradient borders create an expressive, youthful aesthetic. Supports both dark midnight and warm cream modes.

decorators.neo-card: Gradient border card with inner glow effect. Vibrant pink-to-purple border, subtle radial inner glow on hover.
decorators.neo-badge: Pill-shaped badge with gradient fill. Pink-to-purple or blue gradient background with white text.
decorators.neo-hero: Hero section with angled clip-path bottom edge and gradient background. Bold, dramatic entrance.
decorators.neo-button: Pill-shaped button with gradient background and hover scale transform. Energetic and tactile.
decorators.neo-panel: Content panel with top gradient stripe accent. Clean body with vibrant colored top edge.
decorators.neo-surface: Subtle radial gradient background. Adds depth and warmth to page sections.
decorators.neo-input: Rounded input with subtle glow on focus. Gradient focus ring animation.
decorators.neo-divider: Gradient horizontal line divider. Pink-to-purple-to-blue gradient for visual flair.

dashboard.description: Creative dashboard with gradient accents, animated metric cards, and vibrant data visualization.

auth.description: Centered auth with gradient background, floating card with inner glow, and animated entrance.

marketing.description: Bold marketing page with angled hero, gradient CTAs, and energetic scroll animations.

profile.description: User profile with gradient header banner, avatar with glow ring, and pill-shaped action buttons.

neo-card.description: Gradient border card with inner glow effect. Vibrant pink-to-purple border, subtle radial inner glow on hover.
neo-card.intent: Use for all content containers. The gradient border creates a vibrant, anime-inspired frame; the inner glow on hover adds tactile feedback and depth.

neo-badge.description: Pill-shaped badge with gradient fill. Pink-to-purple or blue gradient background with white text.
neo-badge.intent: Use for tags, labels, and status indicators. The gradient pill shape is eye-catching and fits the energetic aesthetic.

neo-hero.description: Hero section with angled clip-path bottom edge and gradient background. Bold, dramatic entrance.
neo-hero.intent: Use for page hero sections and feature banners. The angled clip-path creates dynamic visual energy; the gradient background sets the vibrant tone.

neo-button.description: Pill-shaped button with gradient background and hover scale transform. Energetic and tactile.
neo-button.intent: Use for primary actions and CTAs. The pill shape and gradient create visual weight; the scale transform on hover provides satisfying tactile feedback.

neo-panel.description: Content panel with top gradient stripe accent. Clean body with vibrant colored top edge.
neo-panel.intent: Use for secondary content containers and sidebar panels. The gradient stripe provides a touch of color without overwhelming the content area.

neo-surface.description: Subtle radial gradient background. Adds depth and warmth to page sections.
neo-surface.intent: Use as the root background for the full page. The radial gradient creates a subtle spotlight effect that draws focus to the center content.

neo-input.description: Rounded input with subtle glow on focus. Gradient focus ring animation.
neo-input.intent: Use for all form inputs. The rounded shape matches the pill aesthetic; the gradient focus glow provides clear, on-brand focus indication.

neo-divider.description: Gradient horizontal line divider. Pink-to-purple-to-blue gradient for visual flair.
neo-divider.intent: Use to separate content sections with style. The gradient line adds visual interest while clearly delineating content areas.
